health_conditions: multiple elbow ligament tear - confirmed by MRI

benefits.description: BPC accelerated healing of ligament injury; TB-500 showed visible gains in range of motion after injections
Visible ROM gains following TB-500 injections

side_effects.description: Hematoma and bruising covering 1/2 of upper arm at triceps side

protocol_notes: User has MRI-confirmed multiple partial tears (3) in elbow ligaments. Attempted both local and systemic BPC administration. Used TB-500 in higher doses 2x/week. Recommends combination of BPC and TB-500 due to established synergy for injury recovery. Skeptical of extremely localized effects of single injections; theorizes BPC is absorbed systemically within heartbeats.
